title: Tokens Ask For Context
learning_goal: Establish that a token does not process the full sentence at once — it selects which neighbours matter.

manim_objects.note: Arranged LEFT→RIGHT with buff=0.38. Each tile width=1.4, height=0.65.

manim_objects.content: CurvedArrow from 'cat' to every other token

animation_sequence.action: Create highlight frame around the active token.
LaggedStart creating arcs from active token to every other token.
animation_sequence.manim_hint: self.play(LaggedStart(*[Create(a) for a in arcs], lag_ratio=0.25), run_time=3.0)

pixverse_support.usage: 4-second cinematic intro clip of glowing token tiles. Plays as base layer; Manim overlaid as transparent.
must_preserve: Only soft spotlight and tile-like shapes

music_sfx_cues.purpose: Opening ambient swell as tiles appear.
Accent when active token is highlighted.

acceptance_checks: Sentence token tiles are readable and evenly spaced.
Active token is visually distinct with QUERY_COLOR border.
Arcs communicate selective attention without defining Q/K/V yet.
PixVerse layer contains no readable text or formulas.
